The ministry, known as MeitY, has given Meta three days to explain why regulatory action should not follow the feature’s announcement. T he I-2SEA system will run 3,600 kilometres and is intended to support the AI, cloud and hyperscale workloads that have made India one of the world’s most contested data […] This story continues at The Next Web]]> Raja Koduri’s Oxmiq raises $35m to rent out AI chip design instead of selling chips https://thenextweb.com/news/oxmiq-35-million-oxcore-chip-architecture Thu, 02 Jul 2026 11:10:24 +0000 TheNextWeb=cb46a454b38ae2610255c4177d7c4f64 Oxmiq Labs has closed a $35m Series A to scale OxCore, a licensable GPU architecture the startup says lets chipmakers build custom AI silicon without running a full, multi-year design programme of their own. The round brings the company’s total capital raised to $60m since its founding by veteran chip architect Raja Koduri. The standards would reportedly set benchmarks and timelines for advanced models, while clarifying who gets access to them inside the US and abroad.
